programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin takes a tour of the restaurants and breweries that are opening back up after Hurricane Helene; prepping homeowners Jim and Allies' house to be painted; Mark installs a fireplace at the North Asheville project.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Regrading a backyard to improve the lawn's health; houseplants that thrive at any light level; upgrading hollow-core doors to solid-core doors.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Exploring the Caribbean heritage of actors Liza Colón-Zayas and Delroy Lindo.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1941 C.F. Martin 000-42 guitar; a Louis XVI-style porphyry and bronze mirror circa 1880; a Maria Koogle schoolgirl needlework circa 1817.

programme.title: Bugs That Rule the World
programme.desc: The colorful world of Earth's essential pollinators -- bees, moths and butterflies.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: In Canada, a baby turtle ventures through a forest in search of the lake where she will spend the next 50 years; a young bush baby in South Africa searches for a new home.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: NASA's New Horizons probe captures the first-ever detailed images of the icy world of Pluto.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Double Tibble Trouble; Arthur's Almost Live Not Real Music Festival
programme.desc: The gang hopes that dealing with the Tibble twins will be easier when one gets sick; Arthur and his friends make music videos.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: How to Interrogate a Unicorn; The Briefcase
programme.desc: Olive and Otto must figure out how and why characters are escaping from their books; a shape-shifter steals Ms. O's briefcase.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
